name: create_session
description:
Create a session in a given database for query executions using execute_sql tool.

* Session can be reused to execute multiple concurrent operations.

database.description: Required. The database in which the new session is created. Format: `projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/databases/{database}`

fineGrainedAccessRole.description: Optional. The fine grained access role of the session. All operations performed using the session will be performed with the fine grained access role.
